features: The essential toothbrush for children aged 3 and over for more effective and gentle cleaning
Gentle on gums with extra soft filaments
2 brushing modes: Daily Clean Modes and Unique Sensitivity Plus for an incredibly smooth experience
Personalize the brush handle with 4 fun interchangeable stickers
description: Product Description The Oral-B Pro Kids electric children's toothbrush for children aged 3 and up provides more fun when brushing teeth while providing gentle, effective teeth cleaning and dental care with individual favourite heroes. With the extra soft bristles and the unique, child-friendly Sensitiv+ mode, sensitive gums are protected and the teeth are gently cleaned. The electronic toothbrush removes more plaque than a conventional manual toothbrush. The package includes 4 different stickers that your child can stick to the handpiece. Directions Read the package leaflet before use. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from open flame or direct heat sources. See more
